GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [ca_zip@0 ASC NULLS LAST, ca_city@1 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[ca_zip@0 ASC NULLS LAST, ca_city@1 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ca_zip, ca_city], aggr=[sum(web_sales.ws_sales_price)]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8388608
        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ca_zip@0, ca_city@1], 8), input_partitions=8
          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ca_zip, ca_city], aggr=[sum(web_sales.ws_sales_price)]
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8388608
              GpuFilterExec: predicate=substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 85669 OR substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 86197 OR substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 88274 OR substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 83405 OR substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 86475 OR substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 85392 OR substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 85460 OR substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 80348 OR substr(ca_zip@2, 1, 5) = 81792 OR mark@3, projection=[0, 1, 2]

                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=LeftMark, on=[(i_item_id@3, i_item_id@0)], projection=[0, 1, 2, 4]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8388608
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_id@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuProjectExec: expr=[ws_sales_price@1 as ws_sales_price, ca_city@2 as ca_city, ca_zip@3 as ca_zip, i_item_id@0 as i_item_id]

                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, ws_item_sk@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4, 5]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8388608
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
